author: cket
text: Updating FileInfo attributes can delete file

author: cket
text: When a FileInfo object is modified with non-inlined content and without rewriting the content itself, the file is mistakenly assumed to be outdated and deleted.

author: cket
text: Insures FileInfo does not unintentionally delete content (resolves [#832](https://github.com/DataBiosphere/toil/issues/832))

text: Insures FileInfo does not unintentionally delete content (resolves [#832](https://github.com/DataBiosphere/toil/issues/832))

author: hannes-ucsc
text: Is there an easy way to add a test (or modify an existing test) that exposes this bug?

author: cket
text:
